calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA / hippocampally-planned arm
items.note: V3 FULL-COMPLETION GATE for MECH-163 dual goal-directed systems. THE discriminative test for the VTA / hippocampally-planned arm of MECH-163. Substrate prerequisites all landed 2026-04-27: SD-039 anchor goal-snapshot payload (V3-EXQ-494 6/6 PASS), MECH-292 ranked ghost-goal bank (V3-EXQ-496 5/5 PASS), MECH-293 waking ghost-goal probe search (V3-EXQ-497 5/5 PASS). EXQ-327 was reclassified to ['SD-015'] only on 2026-04-27 (R1 governance fix); the dual-system distinction itself remained untested until this run. Design: 3 conditions (HABIT value-flat proposals; PLANNED ghost-seeded proposals via MECH-293; ABLATED no goal anywhere) x 2 paradigms (A_DETOUR mid-episode blockage at T_block=60% on the cached short corridor; B_NOVEL_CONTEXT cross-episode env swap from train seed to seed=137) x 7 seeds. P0 100 ep encoder warmup + P1 100 ep full pipeline + P2 50 ep evaluation, 200 steps/ep. Acceptance C1-C5: C1 PLANNED.ghost_branch_fires (mech293_n_ghost_admitted > 0 in both paradigms); **C2 PLANNED.benefit_post_block - HABIT.benefit_post_block >= 0.30 in detour, >= 4/7 seeds -- THE V3 full-completion criterion**; C3 HABIT >= ABLATED in standard episodes (within-experiment regression); C4 PLANNED.prox_r2 >= 0.7 (encoder unbroken); C5 PLANNED.harm within 10% of HABIT (no harm regression). KL_PLANNED_HABIT first-step-action-distribution divergence recorded as diagnostic. FISHTANK VIZ: per-step recording during P2 eval on FISHTANK_RECORD_SEED=42 only, FISHTANK_EPISODES_PER_CELL=3 first episodes per (condition, paradigm) cell -- 6 cells total -- writes sibling *_episode_log.json that fishtank_viz.html /api/fishtank/logs auto-discovers. Per-step record carries ghost_admitted (MECH-293 tick firing) and is_blocked_step (paradigm-A detour injection moment) so the viewer surfaces the PLANNED-vs-HABIT routing contrast directly. RUNTIME ESTIMATE: 42 cells x 250 episodes x 200 steps. Mac calibrated at ~0.10 min/ep -> ~17h single-machine; ree-cloud-1 calibrated at ~0.23 min/ep -> ~40h. machine_affinity=any to let the first idle worker claim it; estimated_minutes=1500 (~25h) as defensive midpoint -- runner auto-calibrates from actual elapsed. Diagnostics, fishtank log, and acceptance evaluation all run synchronously inside main() at end-of-run. Successor experiment if FAIL: see KL_PLANNED_HABIT diagnostic (KL ~ 0 + C2 fail = paradigm not requiring multi-step planning; KL > 0 + C2 fail = candidates differ but E3 scoring washes them out).

items.title: MECH-269b VsRolloutGate substrate-readiness probe (Q-040a precondition)
items.note: Smoke-only substrate-readiness probe. /diagnose-errors 2026-04-27 root-cause: V3-EXQ-490 + 490a both FAILed c1 (vs_gate_total_held = 0 across both arms in all 3 seeds) because the gate's hold trigger (V_s < 0.4) is unreachable under typical Phase 1 V_s dynamics. Phase 1 V_s is an identity-prediction proxy (1 - normalized_delta) that stays near 0.9-1.0 under aligned latents; reaching 0.4 needs ~9 consecutive ticks of fully misaligned latent. V3-EXQ-490b raises vs_gate_e1_threshold + vs_gate_e2_threshold to 0.85 and vs_gate_snapshot_refresh_threshold to 0.95 so the gate fires under typical Phase 1 V_s dynamics. PASS confirms substrate wiring (Q-040a precondition) but does NOT test MECH-269b's stale-stream-discrimination hypothesis (Q-040b) -- at smoke thresholds, even healthy streams with mild velocity get held. claim_ids = ['Q-040'] only per /diagnose-errors claim_ids accuracy review (MECH-269b dropped because experiment does not produce interpretable signal for its mechanism claim). Q-040b remains gated on Phase 2 forward-predictor V_s OR a substrate change wiring staleness_accumulator into VsRolloutGate.gate() before threshold comparison. supersedes V3-EXQ-490a.

items.title: OCD Layer 1: closure-threshold sweep on V3 monostrategy (SD-034 parameter diagnostic)
items.note: OCD three-layer architectural model (REE_assembly/docs/architecture/psychiatric_failure_modes.md 2026-04-28 OCD section) Layer 1 hypothesis test: does sweeping closure_rule_delta_threshold attenuate baseline V3 monostrategy? 4-arm sweep {TIGHT 0.0001, DEFAULT 0.001, LOOSE 0.005, VERY_LOOSE 0.05} x 3 seeds (42, 7, 13). Base agent SD-034 active (use_closure_operator + use_lateral_pfc_analog + use_dacc all True), all V_s circuit OFF, all abstraction substrates OFF -- isolates SD-034 closure threshold as single manipulated variable. Env: CausalGridWorldV2 mirroring EXQ-482 baseline-monostrategy diagnostic with SD-029 curriculum ON. Metric: action_class_entropy (primary, mirrors EXQ-482), n_closure_fires (sanity), action_class_counts. PASS = at AT LEAST ONE of {LOOSE, VERY_LOOSE}, entropy(arm) > entropy(DEFAULT) + 0.1 in >= 2/3 seeds; supports closure-threshold-tuning as Layer-1 contributor. FAIL = monostrategy invariant across thresholds; rules out Layer 1 and licenses Layer 2 (MECH-290 ablation diagnostic) or Layer 3 (SD-046 multi-slot GoalState pull-forward). NOT governance evidence on SD-034 correctness (substrate validated by EXQ-460/466). Independent of EXQ-490/490b V_s pathway -- V_s OFF in this experiment. claim_ids=['SD-034'] only per claim_ids accuracy rule (parameter sweep on SD-034 substrate; PASS=supports threshold tuning, FAIL=non_contributory not weakens because substrate not under test).

items.title: SD-016 attention-uniformity diagnostic probe (EXQ-418e follow-up)
items.note: Diagnostic probe localising the EXQ-418d/418e attn_entropy_mean=ln(16) uniform-rail failure mode. Single seed (42), 30 episodes total (P0=10 P1=20), single config matching EXQ-418e A1_writes_only (sd016_enabled=True, sd016_writepath_mode='sense_only', alpha_world=0.9, div_weight=0.0). After training, samples 64 z_world states from a random-policy rollout in the safe env and recomputes the SD-016 attention path manually, dumping per-batch q/k norm stats, raw and scaled dot-product distributions, slot argmax histogram, attention entropy stats, and the scale that would produce target mean entropy 1.5 nats. Acceptance D1-D4 (n_samples>=16; entropy in [0, ln(num_slots)]; raw dotprod std>1e-6; q/k norms>1e-4) -- diagnostic-only PASS criteria meaning the probe ran. MUST NOT update SD-016 claim confidence (evidence_class=diagnostic_probe). Outcome localises whether the bottleneck is query magnitude, key magnitude, or scale, before committing to the EXQ-418g selectivity-first fix. claim_ids=['SD-016'] only per claim_ids accuracy rule (probe instrumenting SD-016 substrate; PASS=instrumentation worked, no scientific verdict).

items.title: SD-016 Path 4 query-selectivity-first 4-arm (learned temperature + attention-entropy loss)
items.note: SD-016 Path 4 hypothesis: query selectivity (not slot content) is the EXQ-418d/418e bottleneck. New substrate hooks landed 2026-04-28: E1Config.sd016_temperature_learnable (replaces fixed sqrt(memory_dim) divisor with exp(log_tau); init at log(sqrt(128)) so step-0 is bit-identical) + E1.compute_attention_entropy_loss(z_world) (gradient pressure on world_query_proj+key_proj+log_tau toward peaky attention). 4-arm 3-seed factorial: B0_off baseline (replicates EXQ-418e A0_off); B1_sel_only (temp+ent_loss only, no div); B2_div_only (replicates EXQ-418e A2_div_only as null); B3_sel_plus_div (full hypothesis). All arms sd016_writepath_mode='off' to isolate read path from luck-of-init writes. Acceptance C1-C5: C1 selectivity arms (B1, B3) clear attn_entropy<2.65 in all 3 seeds; C2 no-sel arms (B0, B2) stay above 2.65; C3 div arms (B2, B3) achieve slot_diversity>0.10 all seeds; C4 action_class_entropy(B1)-action_class_entropy(B0)>=0.10 -- selectivity ALONE produces behavioural delta (resolves the EXQ-418e open question 'does cue_context need to be informative?'); C5 action_class_entropy(B3)-action_class_entropy(B2)>=0.10 -- selectivity adds on top of diversification. PASS=C1+C2+C3+C4+C5. FAIL on C4 with C1 PASS = attention sharpens but cue_context still inert -- bottleneck downstream of ContextMemory and Path 4 insufficient (pivot to band-aid removal EXQ-418h or VQ codebook EXQ-418i). LAMBDA_ATTN_ENTROPY=0.05 is the initial weight; FAIL on C1 alone -> follow-up 1-arm sweep. claim_ids=['SD-016'] only.
